title: When status changes from something, notify someone
excerpt: There is currently no option in automations to choose, , ‘when status changes from something, notify someone’. I don’t want any reference to narrow down what the status changes to because there are several difference sta…

posts.author: Ggould (Gemma Gould)
posts.cookedHtml:
There is currently no option in automations to choose, , ‘when status changes from something, notify someone’. I don’t want any reference to narrow down what the status changes to because there are several difference status’ that could fit.

The changed ‘from’ status is the key for this automation.

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would this work for you? The second line is where you can define the “from”, in this example it is only going to notify of a status change when the status was already in the “Working on it” status.
